title: lolium italicum var. muticum
intro: Lolium italicum var. muticum, also known as Italian rye-grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been known to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Lolium italicum var. muticum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
